title: Skill stderr telemetry event
description: JSONL event emitted by skills/_shared/runtime_telemetry.py when structured stderr mode is enabled.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp with millisecond precision and trailing Z.

level.description: Caller-supplied severity such as warning or error.

correlation_id.description: Wrapper-provided correlation ID when a caller sets SKILL_CORRELATION_ID.
